scale: 0-100 honest self-assessment of LocalAIFactory as a local-first software reasoning platform; not externally audited

codeUnderstanding.note: Real Roslyn CodeGraph (1308 nodes/1699 edges over the repo) with roles + typed edges + impact. Syntax-only: no precise call graph.

graphRetrieval.note: Deterministic hybrid retrieval (symbol/impact/tests/knowledge/experience); no Qdrant needed. Keyword (not embedding) ranking.

knowledgeEngine.note: 39 packs / ~1093 items, verified; now queryable by the reasoning engine.

modelRouting.note: Role roster + health + graceful Ollama fallback + audit log; never blocks core. No streaming/embedding pipeline yet.

safeAgentExecution.note: Default-deny tool gateway + path sandbox + isolated patch runner with rollback; no commit/push capability. Classifier is heuristic, not a full shell parser.

generatorTraining.note: Generator reproduces hand-built ERP at ~92%; lessons now harvested into packs.

localFirstOperation.note: Entire reasoning core runs with MSSQL-only / no Ollama / no Qdrant; 124 tests pass without a model.

uiApiUsefulness.note: Reasoning controller + 8 endpoints + page, graceful when source absent; UI is functional but thin (11 tests, target 40 not met).

productionReadiness.note: Gate V3 NEAR_GA unchanged; reasoning engine is pilot-grade, not production-hardened.

externalBlockers.note: Unchanged: customer pilot, external security review, CA TLS, SSO/OIDC remain.

result: NOT fully met (70.6) — a genuine, tested reasoning engine was delivered, but per-component test targets (50-60+ each) and a full autonomous agent loop + rich UI were not completed in one sprint.
classification: LAF_SOFTWARE_REASONING_ENGINE_PILOT_READY (core delivered; stretch LOCAL_PRODUCTION_READY_CORE not yet reached)
